title: Pestshield Max Strength Citronella Wrist Bands for Kids Pack of 2
features: MAX STRENGTH: Pestshield Citronella Wrist Bands offers max strength for the whole family; perfect for camping, walking, fishing, picnics and outdoor activities
LONG LASTING: Pestshield Citronella Wrist Bands last up to 7 days, offering multiple days of protection and includes 2 patches in each pack for multi use or quick replacements
EASY TO USE: Pestshield Citronella Wrist Bands are an easy and simple to use product; simply peel from plastic sheet and apply to wrists for up to 7 days protection
HOW TO USE: Remove the band from the packaging; wear on the wrist to release the citronella scent; do not wear on ankles or legs; if the band is constrictive around the skin do not use in this area
Do not use whilst sleeping; dispose once citronella scent has gone
description: Pestshield Citronella Wrist Bands offers max strength for the whole family! Perfect for camping, walking, fishing, picnics and outdoor activities. Pestshield Citronella Wrist Bands last up to 7 days, offering multiple days of protection and includes 2 patches in each pack for multi use or quick replacements. Pestshield Citronella Wrist Bands are an easy and simple to use product. Simply peel from plastic sheet and apply to wrists for up to 7 days protection! Remove the band from the packaging. Wear on the wrist to release the citronella scent. Do not wear on ankles or legs. If the band is constrictive around the skin do not use in this area. Do not use whilst sleeping. Dispose once citronella scent has gone.
